description: Mistral instruct max-context ladder bucket for exact Mistral 7B Instruct v0.3 Q8_0 at 16384 context. Synthetic recall prompt checks prompt-token and generated-token parity without implying broad support.

prompts.note: Synthetic recall prompt for the Mistral 16384-context ladder bucket; actual prompt token count is recorded from llama.cpp.

messages.content: You are checking deterministic local mistral parity for a bounded 16384 context bucket. Answer with the final requested marker only.
